title: Service + DTO — Event API
description:
### Your Task

Build an Event CRUD API with Service + DTO. This one has a computed field in the response.

### Requirements

- `Event` entity: `id` (Long), `name` (String), `location` (String), `startTime` (String), `endTime` (String), `organizer` (String)
- `EventRequestDTO`: `name`, `location`, `startTime`, `endTime`, `organizer`
- `EventResponseDTO`: `id`, `name`, `location`, `schedule` (startTime + " to " + endTime), `organizer`
- `EventRepository`, `EventService`, `EventController` at `/api/events`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/events` → List of EventResponseDTO (200)
- `GET /api/events/{id}` → EventResponseDTO (200 or 404)
- `POST /api/events` → Accept EventRequestDTO, return EventResponseDTO (201)
- `PUT /api/events/{id}` → Accept EventRequestDTO, return EventResponseDTO (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/events/{id}` → 204 or 404

### Key Concepts

- Computed field: `schedule` = startTime + " to " + endTime
- Example: startTime="10:00 AM", endTime="2:00 PM" → schedule="10:00 AM to 2:00 PM"
hints: schedule = startTime + ' to ' + endTime — compute it in the service during mapping
startTime and endTime are stored separately in the entity but combined in the response
